Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-19-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

David Simon appearing via Zoom for Petitioner Tanisha Lawrence-Caceres and Objector Diandra Lawrence.
Eula Mae Sherman Lawrence, Petitioner in Propria Persona.

The parties report to the court that they successfully completed mediation with Mediator Sanford Kingsley and entered into a written Settlement Agreement. Mrs. Eula Sherman Lawrence confirms that she is withdrawing her Amended Petition for Letters of Administration and her objections to the Petition for Letters Testamentary filed by Diandra Lawrence and Tanisha Lawrence-Caceres.

The parties discuss whether a $20,000.00 bond will be necessary, and both sides agree that no bond should be required.

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 26, 2022 is admitted to probate. Tanisha Lawrence-Caceres is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for December 24, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Isidoor Bornstein is the appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Continued To Nov-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-17-2024 Continued To Nov-19-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Eula Maae Sherman Lawrence appeared in person (pro per) (petitioner).
Ryan Jorgenson appeared via zoom for and with Diandra Lawrence (objector).

Mr. Jorgeson stated that he is requesting a evidentiary hearing, that they have handwriting examples to contest the will, and that they agree to pro-bono mediation. The Court suggest taking depositions before the evidentiary hearing. The Court also orders parties to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed by November 8, 2024. Counsel must notify the assigned Probate Examiner of the status of the mediation by November 15, 2024. A Status hearing on the underlying petition is set on November 19, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Both petitions are continued to November 19, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Ng. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Continued To Sep-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ryan Jorgensen for and with Diandra Lawrence by zoom and for Tanisha Lawrence Caceres.
Sherman Lawrence (spouse) in propria persona.

The court waives defect in notice with regard to remote appearances. The court also stated that it just got Sherman's response and objections, that it did not have the opportunity to review them as they just came in yesterday and encouraged Mr. Jorgensen and Sherman Lawrence to meet and confer and talk about a way to move forward on these petitions. The Amended Petition for Letters of Administration, and the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary are continued to September 17, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Aguerre. Not reported.
